name: Oxwich Bay & Point
dog_lead_policy: On lead in nature reserve; beach restrictions May–Sep
highlights: Long sandy beach, woodland and the ruins of Oxwich Castle.
points_of_interest: Oxwich Castle (Cadw); St Illtyd's church in woods
viewpoints: Oxwich Bay panorama; Pwll Du Head
food_drink_nearby: Oxwich Bay Hotel; Beach House Restaurant (upscale)
hazards_notes: Seasonal dog ban on main beach (May–Sep)
